summary: TODAY Panel (Time Layer) comprehensive UI testing completed. All 8 requested features verified working correctly on desktop and mobile viewports.

TODAY_tab_click_opens_panel.details: Clicking [data-testid='os-tab-today'] opens the TODAY panel as a modal overlay

TODAY_panel_header_with_count_badge.details: Header shows 'Today' text, Calendar icon, and count badge [data-testid='today-count'] when items exist (shows nothing when 0 items)

TODAY_panel_refresh_button_and_timestamp.details: Refresh button with RefreshCw icon present, timestamp shows current time (e.g., '5:49 AM')

TODAY_panel_close_button.details: Close button [data-testid='today-close-btn'] works correctly - removes panel from DOM when clicked

TODAY_panel_empty_state.details: Shows 'All caught up! No urgent items for [pet name] today. Check back later for reminders' when no items

TODAY_panel_mobile_bottom_sheet.details: On mobile (390x844): Panel has borderRadius '24px 24px 0px 0px', maxWidth 100%, overlay alignItems 'flex-end' (bottom sheet style)

TODAY_panel_overlay_close_on_click.details: Clicking on overlay (outside panel) closes the panel. Clicking inside panel does NOT close it.

TodayPanel_renders_without_errors.details: Component renders without JavaScript errors. Console shows no errors related to TodayPanel.

critical_code_review_comments: TodayPanel.jsx: Well-structured with proper memoization (memo) on sub-components for performance
Proper data-testid attributes: today-panel, today-panel-overlay, today-close-btn, today-count, today-empty, urgent-card, due-soon-card, environment-alert, birthday-countdown, other-pets-section
CSS follows MOJO Bible: 200ms ease-out animations, 44x44px minimum touch targets (close button is 48x48px on mobile)
Mobile responsive: @media (max-width: 640px) converts to bottom sheet with larger touch targets
context_for_next_testing_agent: TODAY panel fully implemented and tested. Panel shows empty state ('All caught up!') when no urgent items exist for the pet. On mobile, displays as bottom sheet. All MOJO Bible UI/UX golden rules followed including 44px touch targets, 200ms animations, and calm interface design.
